<style>
  /*HS Form CSS Start*/
  :root {
    --body__font: Satoshi, Verdana, sans-serif;
  }
  .hform, 
  .hform.is--dark .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row .hsfc-FieldLabel, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row .hsfc-ErrorAlert, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row .hsfc-RichText {
    font-family: var(--body__font);
  }
  .hform.is--dark .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row .hsfc-FieldLabel, 
  .hform .hsfc-Row .hsfc-RichText {
    color: #fff;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form .hs_error_rollup, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-NavigationRow__Alerts {
    display: none;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form ul, 
  .hform .hbspt-form ol{
    color: inherit;
    list-style: none;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form fieldset ul.hs-error-msgs > li:not(:last-child) {
    margin-bottom: var(--layout--scale--scale-8);
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form fieldset ul.hs-error-msgs li, 
  .hform .hbspt-form ul.hs-error-msgs li Label, 
  .hform .hbspt-form .field label, 
  .hform .hbspt-form li, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row .hsfc-ErrorAlert {
    font-family: var(--body__font);
    margin: 0;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 120%;
  }
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row .hsfc-ErrorAlert {
    margin: var(--layout--scale--scale-4) 0px 0;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form fieldset .field > label, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row .hsfc-FieldLabel {
    font-size: var(--layout--scale--scale-14);
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-bottom: var(--layout--scale--scale-8);
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form li:not(:last-child), 
  .hform .hsfc-Form li:not(:last-child) { 
    margin-bottom: var(--layout--scale--scale-4);
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form, 
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset, 
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .field {
    max-width: 100%;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .hs-richtext, 
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .hs-richtext p,
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row .hs-richtext, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row .hs-richtext p{
    font-size: var(--layout--scale--scale-18);
    line-height: 160%;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input .hs-form-booleancheckbox-display, 
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input .hs-form-booleancheckbox-display p {
    font-size: 1rem;
    line-height: 1.5rem;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .hs-richtext p a, 
  .hform .hbspt-form li a {
    text-decoration: underline;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset:not(:last-child) > *, 
  .hform .hbspt-form form .hs_error_rollup:not(:last-child) {
    margin-bottom: var(--layout--scale--scale-20);
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .legal-consent-container, 
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .hs-dependent-field, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Step__Content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    row-gap: var(--layout--scale--scale-20);
  }
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Step__Content {
    padding: 0 !important;
  }
  .hform .hsfc-PostSubmit {
    background: rgb(5 199 112 / 5%);
    border-radius: 12px;
  }
  .hform .hsfc-PostSubmit .hsfc-Row .hsfc-RichText, 
  .hform .hsfc-PostSubmit .hsfc-Row .hsfc-RichText * {
    color: #fff !important;
    text-align: center !important;
    margin: 0;
    font-family: var(--body__font) !important;
    line-height: 160% !important;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input, 
  .hbspt-form .legal-consent-container .field.hs-form-field, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row {
    margin: 0 !important;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input input,
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input textarea,
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input select, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row input, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row textarea,
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row select {
    border: 1px solid var(--color--greyscale--gs-70);
    border-radius: var(--layout--scale--scale-4);
    background-color: var(--color--greyscale--gs-80);
    width: 100% !important;
    margin-bottom: 0;
    padding: 8px 12px;
    box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px #00000014;
    color: var(--color--greyscale--gs-5);
    font-family: var(--body__font);
  }
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row input:not(.hsfc-CheckboxInput):focus, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row textarea:focus, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row select:focus {
    outline: -webkit-focus-ring-color auto 1px;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input select, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row select {
    background-image: url('https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66b6d7fd4d3e9cef94717176/690b270293bfa38b8bddcbd3_select-arrow.svg');
    background-position: calc(100% - 12px) center;
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-size: 12px;
    cursor: pointer;
    appearance: none;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input .hs-form-booleancheckbox-display, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row .hsfc-CheckboxFieldGroup__Options label.hsfc-FieldLabel {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: space-between;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input .hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"], 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row input[type="checkbox"] {
    width: 16px;
    max-width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color--greyscale--gs-5);
    appearance: none;
    padding: 0;
    margin: var(--layout--scale--scale-4) 0 0;
    background: transparent;
    position: relative;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input .hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]::after, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row input[type="checkbox"]::after {
    content: '';
    width: calc(100% - 4px);
    height: calc(100% - 4px);
    position: absolute;
    left: 2px;
    top: 2px;
    background: var(--color--greyscale--gs-5);
    border-radius: 2px;
    opacity: 0;
    visibility: hidden;
    transition: 0.2s ease-in;
    -webkit-mask-image: unset;
    mask-image: unset;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input .hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:checked::after, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row input[type="checkbox"]:checked::after {
    opacity: 1;
    visibility: visible;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input .hs-form-booleancheckbox-display > span, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row .hsfc-CheckboxFieldGroup__Options label.hsfc-FieldLabel > span{
    width: calc(100% - 24px);
    display: block;
    margin: 0;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset .input .hs-form-booleancheckbox-display p strong {
    font-weight: 600;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset.form-columns-2, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    flex-direction: row;
    gap: var(--layout--scale--scale-20) 0px;
  }
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row > * {
    flex: 1 1 100%;
  }
  /* If there are 2 columns */
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row > *:first-child:nth-last-child(2),
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row > *:first-child:nth-last-child(2) ~ div {
    flex: 0 0 calc(50% - var(--layout--scale--scale-8));
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset.form-columns-2 .field {
    width: calc(50% - var(--layout--scale--scale-8));
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form fieldset ul.hs-error-msgs {
    margin: var(--layout--scale--scale-4) 0px 0;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form .hs-error-msgs, 
  .hform .hbspt-form .hs-error-msgs a {
    color: var(--color--red--red-50);
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form .hs_submit .actions {
    margin-bottom: var(--layout--scale--scale-20);
  }
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-NavigationRow {
    margin: 0;
  }
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-NavigationRow__Buttons {
    width: 100%;
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form .hs_submit .actions input, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-NavigationRow__Buttons button.hsfc-Button {
    color: var(--color--greyscale--gs-5);
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: var(--layout--scale--scale-16);
    letter-spacing: normal;
    text-transform: none;
    background-color: var(--color--green--green-60);
    border-style: solid;
    border-width: 0;
    width: 100%;
    padding: .75em 1.5em;
    line-height: 1.5;
    transition: color .3s, box-shadow .3s, background-color .2s;
    box-shadow: 0 0 #19aa594d, inset 0 1px 1px #fff3;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: var(--body__font);
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form form .hs_submit .actions input:hover, 
  .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-NavigationRow__Buttons button.hsfc-Button:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 .25em #19aa594d;
    transform: unset;
  }
  .hform fieldset.form-columns-1 .hs_phone .hs-input {
    width: 100%;
  }
  .hform fieldset.form-columns-1 .hs_phone .hs-input select {
    margin-bottom: var(--layout--scale--scale-16);
  }
  .hform .hs_recaptcha {
    margin-bottom: var(--layout--scale--scale-20);
  }
  .hform .hbspt-form .submitted-message,
  .hform .hbspt-form .submitted-message > * {
    color: var(--color--greyscale--gs-5) !important;
    text-transform: capitalize;
  }

  @media (max-width: 767px){
    .hform .hbspt-form form fieldset.form-columns-2 .field {
      width: 100%;
    }
    .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row > *:first-child:nth-last-child(2),
    .hform .hsfc-Form .hsfc-Row > *:first-child:nth-last-child(2) ~ div {
      flex: 0 0 100%;
    }
  }
  /*HS Form CSS End*/
</style>

// Change navigation background opacity on scroll with GSAP based on variant
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    // Select your navigation element
    const nav = document.querySelector("#LandingHeaderNav");
    
    // Function to update the navigation background opacity
    function updateNavOpacity() {
        const scrollPosition = window.scrollY;
        
        // Get the current variant
        const variant = nav.getAttribute("data-wf--global-header--variant");
        
        if (scrollPosition > 100) {
            // When scrolled, animate to more opaque
            if (variant === "light") {
                // Light variant - more opaque light background
                gsap.to(nav, {
                    backgroundColor: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)",
                    backdropFilter: "blur(25px)",
                    webkitBackdropFilter: "blur(25px)",
                    duration: 0.1,
                    ease: "power2.out"
                });
            } else {
                // Dark variant - more opaque dark background
                gsap.to(nav, {
                    backgroundColor: "rgba(3, 9, 20, 0.8)",
                    backdropFilter: "blur(25px)",
                    webkitBackdropFilter: "blur(25px)",
                    duration: 0.1,
                    ease: "power2.out"
                });
            }
        } else {
            // At top, animate back to original state
            if (variant === "light") {
                // Light variant - less opaque light background
                gsap.to(nav, {
                    backgroundColor: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)",
                    backdropFilter: "blur(0px)",
                    webkitBackdropFilter: "blur(0px)",
                    duration: 0.2,
                    ease: "power2.out"
                });
            } else {
                // Dark variant - less opaque dark background
                gsap.to(nav, {
                    backgroundColor: "rgba(3, 9, 20, 0)",
                    backdropFilter: "blur(0px)",
                    webkitBackdropFilter: "blur(0px)",
                    duration: 0.1,
                    ease: "power2.out"
                });
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Set initial state
    updateNavOpacity();
    
    // Add scroll event listener with requestAnimationFrame for performance
    let ticking = false;
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
        if (!ticking) {
            requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                updateNavOpacity();
                ticking = false;
            });
            ticking = true;
        }
    }, { passive: true });
    
    // Re-run when variant changes (if Webflow changes it dynamically)
    const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
        mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
            if (mutation.type === "attributes" && 
                mutation.attributeName === "data-wf--global-header--variant") {
                updateNavOpacity();
            }
        });
    });
    
    observer.observe(nav, { attributes: true });
});

<script defer="">
  const words = ["Hire", "Upskill", "Become"];
  const typingSpeed = 175; // Time (ms) per character when typing
  const deletingSpeed = 100; // Time (ms) per character when deleting
  const holdTime = 3000; // Time (ms) word stays fully visible before deleting
  const initialPause = 2000; // Time (ms) before animation starts

  const dynamicWord = document.querySelector(".js-dynamic-word"); // Moved here to make it globally accessible
  let wordIndex = 0; // Start with "Hire" since it's already displayed

  function typeWord(word, index, callback) {
    if (index < word.length) {
      dynamicWord.textContent += word[index];
      setTimeout(() => typeWord(word, index + 1, callback), typingSpeed);
    } else {
      setTimeout(callback, holdTime);
    }
  }

  function deleteWord(callback) {
    let text = dynamicWord.textContent;
    if (text.length > 0) {
      dynamicWord.textContent = text.slice(0, -1);
      setTimeout(() => deleteWord(callback), deletingSpeed);
    } else {
      callback();
    }
  }

  function cycleWords() {
    // Skip typing "Hire" initially, only delete it first
    deleteWord(() => {
      wordIndex = (wordIndex + 1) % words.length; // Move to the next word
      typeWord(words[wordIndex], 0, () => {
        deleteWord(() => {
          wordIndex = (wordIndex + 1) % words.length;
          cycleWords();
        });
      });
    });
  }

  window.addEventListener("load", () => {
    setTimeout(() => {
      cycleWords();
    }, initialPause);
  });
</script>

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);

  const textBlocks = document.querySelectorAll(".fade-in-text");

  // Adjustable speed: change this to make the fade faster or slower
  const animationDuration = 0.2; // Duration for each word's fade-in effect

  textBlocks.forEach((block) => {
    const paragraph = block.querySelector("p");

    if (paragraph) {
      // Function to wrap words while treating <b>, <i>, <strong>, and <em> as spans
      const wrapWordsInSpans = (node) => {
        if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && node.textContent.trim() !== "") {
          // Split text into words and spaces
          const wordsAndSpaces = node.textContent.match(/(\s+|\S+)/g) || [];
          const wrappedWords = wordsAndSpaces
            .map((chunk) => {
              if (chunk.trim() === "") {
                // Preserve spaces as-is
                return chunk;
              }
              // Wrap words in spans
              return `<span style="opacity: 0.4;">${chunk}</span>`;
            })
            .join("");
          const wrapper = document.createElement("span");
          wrapper.innerHTML = wrappedWords;
          return wrapper;
        } else if (node.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
          // Handle <b>, <i>, <strong>, <em> as is
          if (["B", "I", "STRONG", "EM"].includes(node.tagName)) {
            node.style.opacity = "0.4"; // Set initial opacity
            return node; // Return the element directly
          }

          // Process child nodes for other elements
          const clonedNode = node.cloneNode(false); // Shallow clone
          node.childNodes.forEach((child) => {
            const wrappedChild = wrapWordsInSpans(child);
            if (wrappedChild) clonedNode.appendChild(wrappedChild);
          });
          return clonedNode;
        }
        return null;
      };

      // Process all child nodes of the paragraph
      const wrappedContent = document.createDocumentFragment();
      paragraph.childNodes.forEach((child) => {
        const wrappedChild = wrapWordsInSpans(child);
        if (wrappedChild) wrappedContent.appendChild(wrappedChild);
      });
      paragraph.innerHTML = ""; // Clear the paragraph
      paragraph.appendChild(wrappedContent); // Add wrapped content
    }

    const spansAndInlineElements = block.querySelectorAll("span, b, i, strong, em");

    // Create GSAP timeline for opacity animation
    const timeline = gsap.timeline({
      scrollTrigger: {
        trigger: block,
        start: "top 60%", // Start when block's top reaches 75% of viewport height
        end: "bottom center", // Finish when block's bottom reaches 25% of viewport height
        scrub: true, // Tie animation to scroll progress
      },
    });

    // Add staggered opacity animation for each element
    spansAndInlineElements.forEach((el, index) => {
      timeline.to(el, { opacity: 1, duration: animationDuration }, index * animationDuration);
    });
  });
});

</script>

<script defer="">
// This approach intercepts and modifies GA4 calls directly

// Create a backup of the original dataLayer.push function
window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
const originalPush = window.dataLayer.push;

// Override the dataLayer.push function
window.dataLayer.push = function() {
  // Get the arguments that were passed to push
  const args = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments);
  
  // Process each argument (usually there's just one object)
  for (let i = 0; i < args.length; i++) {
    const arg = args[i];
    
    // If this is a page_view event or GA4 config call, modify the page path
    if ((arg.event === 'page_view' || arg[0] === 'config') && !arg.modified_by_override) {
      console.log('Intercepted GA4 call:', JSON.stringify(arg));
      
      // Modify the page path
      arg.page_path = '/home-new';
      arg.page_location = 'https://hackerrank.com/home-new';
      arg.modified_by_override = true;
      
      console.log('Modified to use custom path:', arg.page_path);
    }
  }
  
  // Call the original push function with our modified arguments
  return originalPush.apply(window.dataLayer, args);
};

// If gtag is available, also override the config method
if (typeof gtag === 'function') {
  const originalGtag = gtag;
  window.gtag = function() {
    const args = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments);
    
    // If this is a config command, modify it
    if (args[0] === 'config') {
      console.log('Intercepted gtag config call');
      
      // Make sure args[2] is an object
      args[2] = args[2] || {};
      
      // Set the custom page location
      args[2].page_path = '/home-new';
      args[2].page_location = 'https://hackerrank.com/home-new';
      
      console.log('Modified gtag config to use custom path');
    }
    
    // Call the original gtag function
    return originalGtag.apply(window, args);
  };
}

console.log('GA4 overrides installed - will intercept page path data');

// Also send a custom event with our path, as a fallback
setTimeout(function() {
  if (typeof gtag === 'function') {
    gtag('event', 'page_view', {
      'page_path': '/home-new',
      'page_location': 'https://hackerrank.com/home-new',
      'send_to': 'all'
    });
    console.log('Sent backup page_view event with custom path');
  }
}, 1000);
</script>

<script defer="">
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const bgVideos = document.querySelectorAll(".w-background-video > video");

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries, obs) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        const video = entry.target;

        if (!video.dataset.loaded) {
          const sources = video.querySelectorAll("source");

          sources.forEach(source => {
            if (source.dataset.src) {
              source.src = source.dataset.src; // move data-src → src
            }
          });

          video.load();
          video.play().catch(() => {});
          video.dataset.loaded = "true";
        }

        obs.unobserve(video);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.25 });

  bgVideos.forEach(video => {
    const sources = video.querySelectorAll("source");

    sources.forEach(source => {
      if (source.getAttribute("src")) {
        source.setAttribute("data-src", source.getAttribute("src")); // store in data-src
        source.removeAttribute("src"); // prevent preload
      }
    });

    video.setAttribute("preload", "none"); // stop auto preloading
    video.dataset.loaded = ""; // mark as not loaded
    observer.observe(video);
  });
});
</script><script src="https://cookie-consent-cdn-prod.pages.dev/cookie-consent/3.0.26/cookie-consent.js" type="text/javascript" integrity="sha384-WcmtfPM2d2Xun07oQ6Rvrn07DXY7S8lWVFxkvxHo34YKiOwvMukv6EnbY5quP0Xc" crossorigin="anonymous"></script></body></html>
